step_by_step_thinking: I do agree with the claim that the Universal Numbering System (UN) is the most commonly used tooth-numbering system in books. One additional point supporting this view is that many dental schools around the world teach using the UN system from an early stage, ensuring continuity and familiarity throughout students’ careers. Furthermore, since the UN was developed earlier than others like the FDI system, it has had more time to become entrenched in established practices and educational materials. Therefore, my final answer remains **A**: Universal Numbering System.
